allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Major update: Production-ready training system with bug fixes

Training System Improvements:
- Fix data leakage in evaluate_agent\(\) - now passes pre_fitted_scaler
- Add data file validation before training starts
- Remove silent mock data fallback - clear error messages instead
- Add required column validation for CSV files

New Features:
- Add colab_setup.py - complete Colab setup script
- Add infrastructure/ - Docker, Prometheus, AlertManager configs
- Add 25+ agent modules \(risk, news, market regime, etc.\)
- Add multi-asset portfolio support
- Add comprehensive test suite \(Sprint 1-3 tests\)

Agent System:
- Orchestrator for coordinated agent decisions
- Kill switch with hard limits
- News analysis with economic calendar
- Market regime detection
- Intelligent risk sentinel with ML
- Portfolio risk manager with VaR/CVaR

Documentation:
- Project analysis and sprint plans
- Comprehensive project guide

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add sophisticated training system with anti-overfitting

Major additions:
- src/training/: Complete training pipeline with curriculum learning,
  ensemble training, meta-learning, and advanced reward shaping
- scripts/: Colab training scripts and data preparation utilities
- notebooks/: Ready-to-use Google Colab notebooks for training
- src/security/: Security orchestrator, SIEM integration, secrets manager
- src/performance/: Metrics, health checks, async audit logging
- src/live_trading/: MT5 connector, order manager, risk manager
- src/core/: Config loader, exceptions, retry utilities
- src/utils/: Async helpers, latency tracker, ring buffer

Training improvements:
- Multi-objective reward function \(Sharpe, Sortino, drawdown penalty\)
- Realistic transaction costs \(spread, slippage, commission\)
- Built-in risk management \(stop-loss, take-profit, max drawdown\)
- Data augmentation for anti-overfitting
- Early stopping based on validation performance
- Economic calendar integration with real historical data

Documentation:
- ANALYSE_COMPLETE_SYSTEME.md: Full system analysis
- ANALYSE_TRAINING_SYSTEM.md: Training system analysis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
